---
title: "Transcript expression changes in scRNA"
author: "Ye Ji Choi"
format: html
---

```{r echo = F}
library(dplyr)
library(Seurat)
library(aws.s3)
library(jsonlite)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(nebula)
library(openxlsx)
library(table1)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(Hmisc)
library(ggtext)
library(corrplot)
library(gtools)
library(foreach)
library(emmeans)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(future)
library(BiocParallel)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scran)
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr)
```

```{r echo = F}
user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (user == "choiyej") { # local version
  root_path <- "/Users/choiyej/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UW/Laura Pyle - Bjornstad/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive"
  git_path <- "/Users/choiyej/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
} else if (user == "rameshsh") { # hyak version
  root_path <- ""
  git_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/rameshsh/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
} else if (user == "yejichoi") { # hyak version
  root_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/yejichoi/"
  git_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/yejichoi/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/yejichoi/keys.json")
} else if (user == "pylell") {
  root_path <- "/Users/pylell/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-SharedLibraries-UW/Bjornstad/Biostatistics Core Shared Drive"
  git_path <- "/Users/pylell/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
} else {
  stop("Unknown user: please specify root path for this user.")
}

Sys.setenv(
  "AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID" = keys$MY_ACCESS_KEY,
  "AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY" = keys$MY_SECRET_KEY,
  "AWS_DEFAULT_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_S3_ENDPOINT" = "s3.kopah.uw.edu"
)

```

```{r echo = F}
s3read_using_region <- function(FUN, ..., object, bucket, region = NULL, opts = NULL, filename = NULL) {
  if (missing(bucket)) {
    bucket <- get_bucketname(object)
  }
  object <- get_objectkey(object)
  
  tmp <- if (is.character(filename)) {
    file.path(tempdir(TRUE), filename)
  } else {
    tempfile(fileext = paste0(".", tools::file_ext(object)))
  }
  
  on.exit(unlink(tmp))
  
  # Add region to opts if provided
  if (!is.null(region)) {
    if (is.null(opts)) {
      opts <- list(region = region)
    } else {
      opts$region <- region
    }
  }
  
  if (is.null(opts)) {
    r <- save_object(bucket = bucket, object = object, file = tmp)
  } else {
    r <- do.call("save_object", c(list(bucket = bucket, 
                                       object = object, 
                                       file = tmp), opts))
  }
  
  return(FUN(tmp, ...))
}

s3write_using_region <- function(FUN, ..., object, bucket,
                                 region = NULL, opts = NULL, filename = NULL) {
  ext  <- if (!is.null(filename)) tools::file_ext(filename) else tools::file_ext(object)
  tmp  <- tempfile(fileext = if (nchar(ext) > 0) paste0(".", ext) else "")
  on.exit(unlink(tmp))
  FUN(..., file = tmp)
  args <- list(file = tmp, object = object, bucket = bucket)
  if (!is.null(region)) args$region <- region
  if (!is.null(opts))   args        <- c(args, opts)
  do.call(aws.s3::put_object, args)
}
```

```{r echo = F}
pb90 <- s3readRDS(bucket = "scrna", object = 'data_clean/pb90_processed.rds', region = "")
```

# Helper functions

```{r}
theme_transparent <- theme(
    plot.background   = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    panel.background  = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA)
  )
prepare_umap_metadata <- function(
    seurat_obj,
    genes,
    celltype_col = "KPMP_celltype",
    umap_reduction = "umap.harmony",
    color_palette = "Set3",        # RColorBrewer palette name
    custom_colors = NULL           # named vector to override palette entirely
) {
  
  # Determine cell type levels
  celltypes <- levels(seurat_obj@meta.data[[celltype_col]])
  n_celltypes <- length(celltypes)
  
  # Build color mapping
  if (!is.null(custom_colors)) {
    # Use provided named color vector as-is
    celltype_colors <- custom_colors
  } else {
    # Generate from RColorBrewer palette, expanding as needed
    umap_colors <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(min(brewer.pal.info[color_palette, "maxcolors"], n_celltypes), color_palette))(n_celltypes)
    celltype_colors <- setNames(umap_colors, celltypes)
  }
  
  # Fetch gene expression
  expr_df <- Seurat::FetchData(seurat_obj, vars = genes) %>%
    as.data.frame()
  colnames(expr_df) <- genes  # ensure clean names
  
  # Build metadata with UMAP embeddings and expression
  umap_embed_cols <- colnames(seurat_obj@reductions[[umap_reduction]]@cell.embeddings)
  metadata <- seurat_obj@meta.data %>%
    cbind(seurat_obj@reductions[[umap_reduction]]@cell.embeddings) %>%
    cbind(expr_df)
  colnames(metadata)[colnames(metadata) %in% umap_embed_cols] <- c("umapharmony_1", "umapharmony_2")
  
  # Compute cell type centers
  centers <- metadata %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[celltype_col]]) %>%
    summarise(x = median(umapharmony_1),
              y = median(umapharmony_2), .groups = "drop")
  
  list(
    metadata = metadata,
    centers = centers,
    celltype_colors = celltype_colors
  )
}

plot_feature_umap <- function(
    genes,
    metadata,          # pb90_subset_meta equivalent
    centers,           # UMAP label centers df with x, y, KPMP_celltype
    celltype_colors,   # named vector of colors
    pct_threshold = 10,  # minimum % expressed to highlight
    save_to_s3 = FALSE,
    s3_prefix = "Projects/CKD/RH_RH2/Results/Figures/UMAP/REMODEL genes/",
    s3_suffix = "",
    s3_bucket = "scrna",
    plot_height = 10,
    plot_width = 10
) {
  
  plots <- list()
  
  for (gene in genes) {
    
    # Calculate expression stats per cell type
    expr_stats <- metadata %>%
      dplyr::group_by(KPMP_celltype) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        pct_expressed = round(mean(.data[[gene]] > 0) * 100, 1),
        n_total = n(),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      filter(pct_expressed > pct_threshold)
    
    # Tag centers by whether they pass expression threshold
    centers_filtered <- centers %>%
      mutate(pct_expressed_5 = case_when(
        KPMP_celltype %in% expr_stats$KPMP_celltype ~ "Y",
        TRUE ~ "N"
      ))
    
    # Build caption
    caption_text <- expr_stats %>%
      arrange(desc(pct_expressed)) %>%
      mutate(
        color = celltype_colors[KPMP_celltype],
        label = paste0("<span style='color:", color, "'>&#9679; </span>**", KPMP_celltype, "**: ", pct_expressed, "%"),
        group = ceiling(row_number() / 5)
      ) %>%
      dplyr::group_by(group) %>%
      summarise(line = paste(label, collapse = " | "), .groups = "drop") %>%
      rbind(data.frame(group = 0, line = paste0("**% Expressed (>", pct_threshold, "%):**"))) %>%
      arrange(group) %>%
      pull(line) %>%
      paste(collapse = "<br><br>")
    
    # Build plot
    feature_p <- metadata %>%
      dplyr::mutate(feature_color_logic = case_when(
        .data[[gene]] > 0 ~ KPMP_celltype,
        TRUE ~ "No"
      )) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = umapharmony_1, y = umapharmony_2, color = feature_color_logic)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
      geom_text_repel(
        data = centers_filtered,
        aes(x = x, y = y, label = KPMP_celltype),
        inherit.aes = FALSE,
        size = 4,
        fontface = ifelse(centers_filtered$pct_expressed_5 == "Y", "bold", "plain"),
        color = ifelse(centers_filtered$pct_expressed_5 == "Y", "black", "#495057"),
        max.overlaps = Inf
      ) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c(celltype_colors, "No" = "#edede9")) +
      theme_minimal() +
      theme(
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        text = element_text(size = 15),
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        plot.caption = element_markdown(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title.x = element_text(hjust = 0),
        axis.title.y = element_text(hjust = 0)
      ) +
      theme_transparent +
      labs(x = "UMAP1", y = "UMAP2", title = gene, caption = caption_text)
    
    print(feature_p)
    plots[[gene]] <- feature_p
    
    if (save_to_s3) {
      s3write_using_region(
        feature_p,
        FUN = ggsave,
        object = paste0(s3_prefix, gene, "_FeaturePlot", s3_suffix, ".png"),
        bucket = s3_bucket,
        region = "",
        height = plot_height,
        width = plot_width
      )
    }
  }
  
  invisible(plots)  # Return list of plots silently
}

run_nebula_var <- function(var,
                           seurat_obj,
                           ncore = 4,
                           record_id = "record_id") {
  meta <- seurat_obj@meta.data

  # Accept either a string ("visit*treatment", "treatment") or a formula object
  form <- if (inherits(var, "formula")) var else as.formula(paste("~", var))
  vars_used <- all.vars(form)

  # Keep cells with complete data across *every* variable in the formula
  keep <- stats::complete.cases(meta[, vars_used, drop = FALSE])

  if (sum(keep) < 2 || dplyr::n_distinct(meta[[record_id]][keep]) < 2) {
    return(NULL)  # too few cells / subjects to fit
  }

  meta_v   <- meta[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  meta_v   <- droplevels(meta_v)            # drop empty factor levels -> avoid rank-deficient pred
  counts_v <- round(GetAssayData(seurat_obj, layer = "counts"))
  counts_v <- counts_v[, keep, drop = FALSE]
  offset_v <- seurat_obj$pooled_offset[keep]

  pred <- model.matrix(form, data = meta_v)

  data_g <- group_cell(count  = counts_v,
                       id     = meta_v[[record_id]],
                       pred   = pred,
                       offset = offset_v)
  if (is.null(data_g)) {  # group_cell returns NULL if already grouped
    data_g <- list(count = counts_v, id = meta_v[[record_id]],
                   pred = pred, offset = offset_v)
  }

  nebula(count  = data_g$count,
         id     = data_g$id,
         pred   = data_g$pred,
         offset = data_g$offset,
         ncore  = ncore,
         reml   = 1,
         model  = "NBLMM")
}

# run one NEBULA model, save its summary, report convergence
neb_run_and_save <- function(seurat_obj, var, out_object,
                             record_id = NULL, person_col, visit_col = NULL, ncore = 1) {
  md      <- seurat_obj@meta.data
  n_cells <- ncol(seurat_obj)
  people  <- md[[person_col]]

  args <- list(var = var, seurat_obj = seurat_obj, ncore = ncore)
  if (!is.null(record_id)) args$record_id <- record_id
  res <- do.call(run_nebula_var, args)

  # cells per person (per visit if a visit col is given), then median
  if (!is.null(visit_col) && visit_col %in% names(md)) {
    per_person <- as.integer(table(interaction(people, md[[visit_col]], drop = TRUE)))
  } else {
    per_person <- as.integer(table(people))
  }

  stats <- data.frame(
    n_cells                 = n_cells,
    n_people                = length(unique(people)),
    median_cells_per_person = median(per_person)
  )

  # per-group counts for categorical predictor terms only
  terms      <- trimws(strsplit(var, "[*:+]")[[1]])
  terms      <- terms[terms %in% names(md)]
  group_vars <- terms[!vapply(terms, function(t) is.numeric(md[[t]]), logical(1))]
  if (length(group_vars) > 0) {
    grp       <- do.call(interaction, c(md[group_vars], list(drop = TRUE, sep = "_")))
    cells_by  <- table(grp)
    people_by <- tapply(people, grp, function(x) length(unique(x)))
    for (g in names(cells_by)) {
      stats[[paste0("cells_",  g)]] <- as.integer(cells_by[[g]])
      stats[[paste0("people_", g)]] <- as.integer(people_by[[g]])
    }
  }

  out_df <- cbind(res$summary,
                  stats[rep(1, nrow(res$summary)), , drop = FALSE],  # repeat per gene row
                  row.names = NULL)

  s3write_using_region(out_df, FUN = write.csv,
                       bucket = "scrna", object = out_object,
                       row.names = FALSE, region = "")
  message("saved: ", out_object,
          " | cells: ", n_cells, " | people: ", stats$n_people,
          " | converged: ", sum(res$convergence == 1), "/", length(res$convergence))
  invisible(list(summary = out_df, convergence = res$convergence, stats = stats))
}


ct_prep <- function(ct, baseline_only = FALSE) {
  function(obj) {
    keep <- obj$KPMP_celltype %in% ct          # %in% is NA-safe, unlike ==
    if (baseline_only) keep <- keep & obj$visit == "PRE"
    o <- subset(obj, cells = colnames(obj)[keep], features = genes)
    if (baseline_only) {
      o$log_uacr <- log(o$emu_urine_acr_mean)
      o <- subset(o, subset = !is.na(log_uacr))
    }
    o
  }
}

make_prep <- function(groups = NULL, add_log_acr = FALSE) {
  function(obj) {
    keep <- if (is.null(groups)) rep(TRUE, ncol(obj)) else obj$group %in% groups
    o <- subset(obj, cells = colnames(obj)[keep], features = genes)
    if (add_log_acr) {
      o$log_acr_u <- log(o$acr_u)                              # subset's own acr_u
      o <- subset(o, cells = colnames(o)[is.finite(o$log_acr_u)])  # drop NA / -Inf
    }
    o
  }
}

add_celltype <- function(spec, ct, ct_col) {
  force(ct); force(ct_col)
  ct_safe   <- gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_", ct)
  orig_prep <- spec$prep
  list(
    var       = spec$var,
    out       = sub("_neb\\.csv$", paste0("_", ct_safe, "_neb.csv"), spec$out),
    record_id = spec$record_id,
    prep      = function(obj) {
      o <- orig_prep(obj)
      keep <- o@meta.data[[ct_col]] %in% ct
      subset(o, cells = colnames(o)[keep])
    }
  )
}
genes <- c("SLC6A19", "NNMT")
pt_celltypes <- c("PT-S1/S2", "PT-S3", "aPT")
base_dir <- "Projects/transcript search/Results/"
```

# PB90

## SLC6A19 and NNMT

* Cohort: T2D
* Group: SGTL2i

```{r}
# feature plots
slc6a19_pb90_umap_meta <- prepare_umap_metadata(
  seurat_obj = subset(pb90, group == "Type 2 Diabetes"),
  genes = genes)
  
plot_feature_umap(
    genes = genes,
    metadata = slc6a19_pb90_umap_meta$metadata,
    centers = slc6a19_pb90_umap_meta$centers, 
    celltype_colors = slc6a19_pb90_umap_meta$celltype_colors, 
    pct_threshold = 10, 
    save_to_s3 = T,
    s3_prefix = "Projects/transcript search/Results/Figures/UMAP/",
    s3_suffix = "_t2d",
    s3_bucket = "scrna",
    plot_height = 10,
    plot_width = 10
)
```

```{r}
pb90@meta.data <- pb90@meta.data %>%
  mutate(
    dkd_group_30 = case_when(
      eGFR_CKD_epi < 90 | acr_u >= 30 ~ "DKD",
      eGFR_CKD_epi >= 90 & acr_u < 30 ~ "non_DKD",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_),
    dkd_group_30 = factor(dkd_group_30, levels = c("non_DKD", "DKD")),
    dkd_group_100 = case_when(
      eGFR_CKD_epi < 90 | acr_u >= 100 ~ "DKD",
      eGFR_CKD_epi >= 90 & acr_u < 100 ~ "non_DKD",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_),
    dkd_group_100 = factor(dkd_group_100, levels = c("non_DKD", "DKD"))
  )

pb90_analysis_params <- list(
  sglt2i_ever_t2d = list(var = "sglt2i_ever",  
                         out = paste0(base_dir, "pb90_sglt2i_ever_t2d_neb.csv"),
                         prep = make_prep("Type 2 Diabetes")),
  sglt2i_timepoint_t2d = list(var = "sglt2i_ever",  
                         out = paste0(base_dir, "pb90_sglt2i_timepoint_t2d_neb.csv"),
                         prep = make_prep("Type 2 Diabetes")),
  dkd30_t2d       = list(var = "dkd_group_30", out = paste0(base_dir, "pb90_dkd30_t2d_neb.csv"),
                         prep = make_prep(c("Type 2 Diabetes", "Obese Control"))),
  dkd100_t2d      = list(var = "dkd_group_100",out = paste0(base_dir, "pb90_dkd100_t2d_neb.csv"),
                         prep = make_prep(c("Type 2 Diabetes", "Obese Control"))),
  t2d_lc          = list(var = "group",        out = paste0(base_dir, "pb90_t2d_lc_neb.csv"),
                         prep = make_prep(c("Type 2 Diabetes", "Lean Control"))),
  t2d_logacru     = list(var = "log_acr_u",    out = paste0(base_dir, "pb90_t2d_logacru_neb.csv"),
                         prep = make_prep("Type 2 Diabetes", add_log_acr = TRUE)),
  t2dob_logacru   = list(var = "log_acr_u",    out = paste0(base_dir, "pb90_t2dob_logacru_neb.csv"),
                         prep = make_prep(c("Type 2 Diabetes", "Obese Control"), add_log_acr = TRUE)),
  logacru_all     = list(var = "log_acr_u",    out = paste0(base_dir, "pb90_logacru_neb.csv"),
                         prep = make_prep(NULL, add_log_acr = TRUE))
)

pb90_nnmt_celltypes <- c("EC-LYM", "MC")
pb90_celltypes <- c(pb90_nnmt_celltypes, pt_celltypes)

ct_to_col <- c(
  setNames(rep("KPMP_celltype", length(pb90_celltypes)), pb90_celltypes),
  PT = "KPMP_celltype_general"
)

pb90_ct_params <- list()
for (ct in names(ct_to_col)) {
  ct_col <- ct_to_col[[ct]]
  for (name in names(pb90_analysis_params)) {
    key <- paste0(name, "_", gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_", ct))
    pb90_ct_params[[key]] <- add_celltype(pb90_analysis_params[[name]], ct, ct_col)
  }
}

pb90_analysis_params <- c(pb90_analysis_params, pb90_ct_params)

pb90_neb_results <- list()
for (name in names(pb90_analysis_params)) {
  message("\n=== running: ", name, " ===")
  spec <- pb90_analysis_params[[name]]
  obj  <- tryCatch(spec$prep(pb90), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(obj) || ncol(obj) == 0) { message("  skipped: no cells"); next }
  pb90_neb_results[[name]] <- tryCatch(
    neb_run_and_save(obj, var = spec$var, out_object = spec$out,
                     record_id  = NULL,            # wrapper default
                     person_col = "record_id",     # <- set to pb90's actual person/id column
                     visit_col  = NULL),
    error = function(e) { message("  skipped: ", conditionMessage(e)); NULL }
  )
}
```
```{r}
plot_pb90_gene <- function(obj, gene, celltypes, ct_col, tag,
                           group_col = "group", person_col = "record_id") {
  df <- FetchData(obj, vars = c(gene, person_col, group_col, ct_col))
  names(df)[names(df) == gene]       <- "expr"
  names(df)[names(df) == person_col] <- "person"
  names(df)[names(df) == group_col]  <- "group"
  names(df)[names(df) == ct_col]     <- "celltype"
  df <- df %>% filter(celltype %in% celltypes)

  pb <- df %>% group_by(group, celltype, person) %>%
    summarise(mean_expr = mean(expr), .groups = "drop")

  # per-subject pseudobulk by group
  p1 <- ggplot(pb, aes(group, mean_expr, fill = group)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.6) +
    facet_wrap(~ celltype, scales = "free_y") +
    labs(y = paste("Mean", gene, "(log-norm)"), x = NULL) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 15), legend.position = "none",
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1), panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    theme_transparent +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Type 2 Diabetes" = "#e07a5f",
                                 "Type 1 Diabetes" = "#f2cc8f",
                                 "Lean Control" = "#81b29a",
                                 "Obese Control" = "#3d405b"))
  print(p1)
  s3write_using_region(FUN = ggsave, bucket = "scrna", region = "",
    object = paste0(out_dir, "pb90_", gene, "_", tag, "_box.png"),
    width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "transparent")

  # dotplot ("__" delim since group labels contain spaces)
  obj$grp <- paste(obj@meta.data[[ct_col]], obj@meta.data[[group_col]], sep = "__")
  p2 <- DotPlot(obj, features = gene, group.by = "grp")@data %>%
    separate_wider_delim(id, delim = "__", names = c("celltype", "group")) %>%
    filter(celltype %in% celltypes) %>%
    ggplot(aes(celltype, group, size = pct.exp, color = avg.exp.scaled)) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_color_gradient2(low = "#fff0f3", mid = "#fff0f3", high = "#ee7674") +
    theme_minimal() + theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), text = element_text(size = 15)) +
    theme_transparent +
    labs(y = NULL, x = NULL, size = "% expr", color = "Avg expr")
  print(p2)
  s3write_using_region(FUN = ggsave, bucket = "scrna", region = "",
    object = paste0(out_dir, "pb90_", gene, "_", tag, "_dotplot.png"),
    width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "transparent")
}

plot_pb90_gene(pb90, 
               "NNMT",
               c("EC-LYM", "MC"), 
               "KPMP_celltype",
               "topcells")
plot_pb90_gene(pb90, 
               "SLC6A19",
               c("PT-S1/S2", "PT-S3", "aPT"), 
               "KPMP_celltype",
               "PT_sub")
plot_pb90_gene(pb90, 
               "SLC6A19", 
               "PT",
               "KPMP_celltype_general",
               "PT")

```

# ATTEMPT

```{r}
attempt_so_raw <- s3readRDS(bucket = "scrna", object = "Kidney transcriptomics/Single cell RNA seq/PB_attempt_harmony_rpca_RM_kpmpV1labelled_Sept2024.RDS", region = "")

# Identify mitochondrial genes
mito_genes <- grep("^MT-", rownames(attempt_so_raw), value = TRUE)

# Calculate the percentage of mitochondrial transcripts per cell
attempt_so_raw[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(attempt_so_raw, pattern = "^MT-")
hist(attempt_so_raw$percent.mt)

# Identify ribosomal genes
ribo_genes <- c(
  "RPL22", "RPL11", "RPS8", "RPL5", "RPS27", 
  "RPS7", "RPS27A", "RPL31", "RPL37A", "RPL32", "RPL15", "RPL14", "RPL29",
  "RPL24", "RPL22L1", "RPL35A", "RPL9", "RPL34", 
  "RPS3A", "RPL37", "RPS23", "RPS14", "RPS18", "RPS10", "RPL10A", 
  "RPS20", "RPL7", "RPL30", "RPL8", "RPS6", 
  "RPL35", "RPL12", "RPL7A", "RPS24", "RPLP2", "RPL27A", "RPS13", "RPS3",
  "RPS25", "RPS26", "RPL41", "RPL6", "RPLP0", 
  "RPL21", "RPS29", "RPL4", "RPLP1", "RPS17", "RPS2", "RPS15A", "RPL13",
  "RPL26", "RPL23A", "RPL23", "RPL19", "RPL27", 
  "RPL38", "RPL17", "RPS15", "RPL36", "RPS28", "RPL18A", "RPS16", 
  "RPS19", "RPL18", "RPL13A", "RPS11", "RPS9", 
  "RPL28", "RPS5", "RPS21", "RPL3", "RPS4X", "RPL36A", "RPL39", 
  "RPL10", "RPS4Y1"
) # grep("^RPL|^RPS", rownames(attempt_so_raw), value = TRUE) captures some none ribosomal genes
attempt_so[["percent.ribo"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(attempt_so_raw, features = ribo_genes)

# remove MT- genes
attempt_so <- subset(attempt_so, 
                         features = setdiff(rownames(attempt_so), mito_genes)) 
# remove ribosomal genes
attempt_so <- subset(attempt_so, 
                         features = setdiff(rownames(attempt_so), ribo_genes)) 

# renormalize after filtering
attempt_so <- NormalizeData(attempt_so)

# Pooled offset
bp <- MulticoreParam(workers = 4)
counts_layer <- round(GetAssayData(attempt_so, layer = "counts"))
sce <- SingleCellExperiment(assays = list(counts = counts_layer))
sce <- computeSumFactors(sce, BPPARAM = bp)
# Calculate offset → (size factors)
pooled_offset <- sizeFactors(sce)
attempt_so$pooled_offset <- pooled_offset

# pull in ATTEMPT clinical data and merge
attempt_dat <- s3readRDS(bucket = "harmonized.dataset", 
                         object = "attempt_clinical_data.RDS",
                         region = "")
attempt_denver_dat <- s3read_using_region(FUN = read.csv,
                                          bucket = "attempt",
                                          object = "Clinical Data/ATTEMPT_DenverDataRequest_20250314.csv",
                                          region = "")

attempt_denver_dat <- attempt_denver_dat %>%
  mutate(visit = case_when(str_detect(visit, "V1|V2|R1") ~ "PRE",
                           str_detect(visit, "V3") ~ "Safety",
                           str_detect(visit, "V4|V5|R3") ~ "POST")) %>%
  filter(site == "Denver") %>%
  select(-c("site", "treatment_arm", "age", "sex")) %>%
  filter(visit != "Safety") %>%
  dplyr::group_by(subject_id, visit) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(dplyr::across(where(is.numeric), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
                   dplyr::across(where(~ !is.numeric(.x)), dplyr::first),
                   .groups = "drop")

attempt_so_meta <- attempt_so@meta.data %>%
  mutate(subject_id = Subject.ID,
         visit = case_when(Visit == "BL" ~ "PRE", 
                           Visit == "4M" ~ "POST"))
attempt_so_meta <- left_join(attempt_so_meta, attempt_dat, by = c("subject_id", "visit"))
rownames(attempt_so_meta) <- attempt_so_meta$barcode

attempt_so_meta <- left_join(attempt_so_meta, attempt_denver_dat, by = c("subject_id", "visit"))
rownames(attempt_so_meta) <- attempt_so_meta$barcode

assignInNamespace("FilterObjects", SeuratObject:::.FilterObjects, ns = "SeuratObject")
attempt_so <- AddMetaData(attempt_so, attempt_so_meta)
options(future.globals.maxSize = 3000 * 1024^3)

attempt_so$KPMP_celltype_general <- case_when(
  attempt_so$KPMP_celltype %in% c("PT-S1/S2", "PT-S3", "aPT") ~ "PT",
  attempt_so$KPMP_celltype %in% c("C-TAL-1", "C-TAL-2", "aTAL", "dTAL") ~ "TAL",
  attempt_so$KPMP_celltype %in% c("CCD-PC", "CNT-PC", "dCCD-PC", "M-PC", "tPC-IC") ~ "PC",
  attempt_so$KPMP_celltype %in% c("IC-A", "IC-B", "aIC") ~ "IC",
  attempt_so$KPMP_celltype %in% c("EC-AVR", "EC-GC", "EC-PTC", "EC-AEA", "EC-LYM", "EC/VSMC") ~ "EC",
  attempt_so$KPMP_celltype %in% c("MAC", "MON", "cDC", "pDC") ~ "Immune (M)",
  attempt_so$KPMP_celltype %in% c("CD4+ T", "CD8+ T", "B", "NK") ~ "Immune (L)",
  attempt_so$KPMP_celltype %in% c("VSMC/P", "FIB") ~ "VSMC/P, FIB",
  attempt_so$KPMP_celltype %in% c("POD") ~ "POD",
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

s3saveRDS(attempt_so,
          object = "cleaned_data/attempt_clean_unfiltered_so.rds",
          bucket = "attempt",
          region = "",
          multipart = TRUE)
```

## SLC6A19 and NNMT

* Cohort: T1D
* Group: treatment

```{r}
# feature plots at post-treatment visit
slc6a19_attempt_so_umap_meta <- prepare_umap_metadata(
  seurat_obj = subset(attempt_so, visit == "POST"),
  genes = genes)

plot_feature_umap(
    genes = genes,
    metadata = slc6a19_attempt_so_umap_meta$metadata,
    centers = slc6a19_attempt_so_umap_meta$centers, 
    celltype_colors = slc6a19_attempt_so_umap_meta$celltype_colors, 
    pct_threshold = 10, 
    save_to_s3 = T,
    s3_prefix = "Projects/transcript search/Results/Figures/UMAP/",
    s3_suffix = "_attempt_post",
    s3_bucket = "scrna",
    plot_height = 10,
    plot_width = 10
)
```


```{r}
attempt_analysis_params <- list(
  DiD = list(
    var  = "treatment*visit",
    out  = paste0(base_dir, "attempt_DiD_neb.csv"),
    prep = function(obj) subset(obj, features = genes)
  ),
  loguacr_bl = list(
    var  = "log_uacr",
    out  = paste0(base_dir, "attempt_log_uacr_bl_neb.csv"),
    prep = function(obj) {
      o <- subset(obj, subset = visit == "PRE", features = genes)
      o$log_uacr <- log(o$emu_urine_acr_mean)
      subset(o, subset = !is.na(log_uacr))
    }
  )
)

# one DiD analysis per cell type
attempt_nnmt_celltypes <- c("EC-LYM", "aTAL", "ATL")
attempt_celltypes <- c(attempt_nnmt_celltypes, pt_celltypes)

ct_to_col <- c(
  setNames(rep("KPMP_celltype", length(attempt_celltypes)), attempt_celltypes),
  PT = "KPMP_celltype_general"
)

attempt_ct_params <- list()
for (ct in names(ct_to_col)) {
  ct_col <- ct_to_col[[ct]]
  for (name in names(attempt_analysis_params)) {
    key <- paste0(name, "_", gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_", ct))
    attempt_ct_params[[key]] <- add_celltype(attempt_analysis_params[[name]], ct, ct_col)
  }
}
attempt_analysis_params <- c(attempt_analysis_params, attempt_ct_params)

ct_analyses <- setNames(
  lapply(attempt_celltypes, function(ct) list(
    var  = "treatment*visit",
    out  = paste0(base_dir, "attempt_DiD_",
                  gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_", ct), "_neb.csv"),
    prep = ct_prep(ct)
  )),
  paste0("DiD_", gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_", attempt_celltypes))
)

attempt_analysis_params <- c(attempt_analysis_params, ct_analyses)

attempt_neb_results <- list()
for (name in names(attempt_analysis_params)) {
  message("\n=== running: ", name, " ===")
  spec <- attempt_analysis_params[[name]]

  obj <- tryCatch(spec$prep(attempt_so), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (is.null(obj) || ncol(obj) == 0) { message("  skipped: no cells"); next }

  attempt_neb_results[[name]] <- tryCatch(
    neb_run_and_save(obj, var = spec$var, out_object = spec$out,
                     record_id  = "subject_id",
                     person_col = "subject_id",
                     visit_col  = "visit"),
    error = function(e) { message("  skipped: ", conditionMessage(e)); NULL }
  )
}
```

The NNMT data are fascinating.. are you able to stratify by dapa vs. placebo in attempt, and can you show the group differences in PB90 as a barplot or something to better see group differences!

```{r}
out_dir <- "Projects/transcript search/Results/Figures/Box Plots/"
arm_cols <- c("Dapagliflozin 5mg" = "#a7b298", "Placebo" = "#f8ae9d")

plot_attempt_gene <- function(obj, gene, celltypes, ct_col, tag) {
  df <- FetchData(obj, vars = c(gene, "subject_id", "visit", "treatment", ct_col))
  names(df)[names(df) == gene]   <- "expr"
  names(df)[names(df) == ct_col] <- "celltype"
  df <- df %>% mutate(visit = factor(visit, levels = c("PRE", "POST"))) %>%
    filter(celltype %in% celltypes)

  pb <- df %>% group_by(treatment, celltype, subject_id, visit) %>%
    summarise(mean_expr = mean(expr), .groups = "drop")

  base_thm <- theme_minimal() +
    theme(text = element_text(size = 15), legend.position = "none",
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1), panel.grid = element_blank()) +
    theme_transparent

  # spaghetti
  p1 <- ggplot(pb, aes(visit, mean_expr, color = treatment)) +
    geom_line(aes(group = subject_id), alpha = 0.25) +
    stat_summary(aes(group = treatment), fun = mean, geom = "line",  linewidth = 1.3) +
    stat_summary(aes(group = treatment), fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 2.5) +
    facet_wrap(~ celltype, scales = "free_y") +
    labs(y = paste("Mean", gene, "(log-norm)"), x = NULL) +
    base_thm + scale_color_manual(values = arm_cols)
  print(p1)
  s3write_using_region(FUN = ggsave, bucket = "scrna", region = "",
    object = paste0(out_dir, "attempt_", gene, "_", tag, "_spaghetti.png"),
    width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "transparent")

  # delta
  delta <- pb %>% pivot_wider(names_from = visit, values_from = mean_expr) %>%
    mutate(delta = POST - PRE)
  p2 <- ggplot(delta, aes(treatment, delta, fill = treatment)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.6) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
    facet_wrap(~ celltype, scales = "free_y") +
    labs(y = paste0("\U0394 ", gene, " (POST - PRE)"), x = NULL) +
    base_thm + scale_fill_manual(values = arm_cols)
  print(p2)
  s3write_using_region(FUN = ggsave, bucket = "scrna", region = "",
    object = paste0(out_dir, "attempt_", gene, "_", tag, ".png"),
    width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "transparent")

  # dotplot
  obj$grp <- paste(obj@meta.data[[ct_col]], obj$treatment, obj$visit, sep = "_")
  p3 <- DotPlot(obj, features = gene, group.by = "grp")@data %>%
    separate_wider_delim(id, delim = "_", names = c("celltype", "treatment", "visit")) %>%
    filter(celltype %in% celltypes) %>%
    ggplot(aes(celltype, paste0(treatment, "-", visit), size = pct.exp, color = avg.exp.scaled)) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_color_gradient2(low = "#fff0f3", mid = "#fff0f3", high = "#ee7674") +
    theme_minimal() + theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), text = element_text(size = 15)) +
    labs(y = NULL, x = NULL, size = "% expr", color = "Avg expr") +
    theme_transparent
  print(p3)
  s3write_using_region(FUN = ggsave, bucket = "scrna", region = "",
    object = paste0(out_dir, "attempt_", gene, "_", tag, "_dotplot.png"),
    width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "transparent")
}

plot_attempt_gene(attempt_so, 
                  "NNMT",
                  c("EC-LYM", "aTAL", "ATL"), 
                  "KPMP_celltype",
                  "topcells")
plot_attempt_gene(attempt_so, 
                  "SLC6A19",
                  c("PT-S1/S2", "PT-S3", "aPT"), 
                  "KPMP_celltype",
                  "PT_sub")
plot_attempt_gene(attempt_so, 
                  "SLC6A19", 
                  "PT",
                  "KPMP_celltype_general", 
                  "PT")
```
